<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>AnjanaDineth — neofetch</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Share+Tech+Mono&display=swap');

  :root {
    --bg: #0d1117;
    --panel: #161b22;
    --border: #30363d;
    --text: #e6edf3;
    --dim: #8b949e;
    --cyan: #00f7ff;
    --orange: #ff9500;
    --green: #3fb950;
    --pink: #ff6b9d;
    --yellow: #ffd60a;
  }

  .light {
    --bg: #f0f0f0;
    --panel: #ffffff;
    --border: #d0d7de;
    --text: #1f2328;
    --dim: #656d76;
    --cyan: #0969da;
    --orange: #bc4c00;
    --green: #1a7f37;
    --pink: #bf3989;
    --yellow: #9a6700;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 20px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .container {
    background: var(--panel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 960px;
    width: 100%;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }

  .titlebar {
    background: var(--border);
    padding: 10px 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; }
  .dot.red { background: #ff5f57; }
  .dot.yellow { background: #febc2e; }
  .dot.green { background: #28c840; }

  .title-text {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--dim);
    margin-right: auto;
    transform: translateX(-20px);
  }

  .theme-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--dim);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .theme-btn:hover { color: var(--cyan); border-color: var(--cyan); }

  .terminal {
    display: flex;
    padding: 24px;
    gap: 32px;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .ascii-side {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 300px;
  }

  canvas { display: none; }

  #ascii-output {
    font-size: 6.5px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    white-space: pre;
    color: var(--cyan);
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }

  .info-side {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .username {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--cyan);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .separator {
    color: var(--border);
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .section {
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-header {
    color: var(--orange);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .section-header::after {
    content: '';
    flex: 1;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.9;
    align-items: baseline;
  }

  .row-label {
    color: var(--cyan);
    font-size: 11px;
    min-width: 120px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .row-dots {
    color: var(--dim);
    font-size: 10px;
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .row-value {
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .row-value a {
    color: var(--text);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .row-value a:hover { color: var(--cyan); }

  .highlight { color: var(--green); }
  .highlight2 { color: var(--pink); }
  .highlight3 { color: var(--yellow); }

  .color-blocks {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }

  .color-block {
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  }

  .prompt {
    color: var(--dim);
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .prompt-sym { color: var(--green); }
  .cursor {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 8px;
    height: 14px;
    background: var(--cyan);
    animation: blink 1s infinite;
    vertical-align: middle;
    border-radius: 1px;
  }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0} }

  img#source-img { display: none; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<img id="source-img" crossorigin="anonymous" src="" alt="">

<div class="container" id="main">
  <div class="titlebar">
    <div class="dot red"></div>
    <div class="dot yellow"></div>
    <div class="dot green"></div>
    <span class="title-text">anjana@github — bash — 80×40</span>
    <button class="theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()" id="theme-btn">☀ light</button>
  </div>

  <div class="terminal">
    <div class="ascii-side">
      <pre id="ascii-output">Loading...</pre>
    </div>

    <div class="info-side">
      <div class="username">anjana@AnjanaDineth</div>
      <div class="separator">────────────────────────────────────</div>

      <!-- CURRENT PROJECT -->
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-header">Current Project</div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Project</span>
          <span class="row-dots">.................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight">Decentralized Finance</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Status</span>
          <span class="row-dots">..................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight3">[ actively building ]</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Goal</span>
          <span class="row-dots">.................</span>
          <span class="row-value">Ship fast. Learn faster.</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- HOBBIES -->
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-header">Hobbies &amp; Interests</div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Learning</span>
          <span class="row-dots">................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight2">Always. Everyday.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Building</span>
          <span class="row-dots">................</span>
          <span class="row-value">Products &amp; startups</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Movies</span>
          <span class="row-dots">..................</span>
          <span class="row-value">Sci-fi &amp; thrillers 🎬</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Exploring</span>
          <span class="row-dots">................</span>
          <span class="row-value">AI, Web3, ideas 🌐</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Vibe</span>
          <span class="row-dots">...................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight3">Curious by default</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- GITHUB STATS -->
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-header">GitHub Stats</div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Profile</span>
          <span class="row-dots">.................</span>
          <span class="row-value">github.com/AnjanaDineth</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Commits</span>
          <span class="row-dots">.................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight">[ live on your profile ]</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Streak</span>
          <span class="row-dots">..................</span>
          <span class="row-value highlight2">[ auto from streak-stats ]</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SOCIAL -->
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-header">Social Links</div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">LinkedIn</span>
          <span class="row-dots">................</span>
          <span class="row-value"><a href="#">linkedin.com/in/yourprofile</a></span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Twitter / X</span>
          <span class="row-dots">...............</span>
          <span class="row-value"><a href="#">@yourhandle</a></span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <span class="row-label">Email</span>
          <span class="row-dots">...................</span>
          <span class="row-value"><a href="#">your@email.com</a></span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="color-blocks">
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#ff5f57"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#febc2e"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#28c840"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#00f7ff"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#ff6b9d"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#ffd60a"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#bf68ff"></div>
        <div class="color-block" style="background:#e6edf3"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="prompt">
        <span class="prompt-sym">❯</span>
        <span>always building, always learning</span>
        <span class="cursor"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const IMG_B64 = "";

let isDark = true;

function toggleTheme() {
  isDark = !isDark;
  document.getElementById('main').classList.toggle('light', !isDark);
  document.body.classList.toggle('light', !isDark);
  document.getElementById('theme-btn').textContent = isDark ? '☀ light' : '🌙 dark';
  renderAscii();
}

function renderAscii() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const img = document.getElementById('source-img');

  const W = 55, H = 50;
  canvas.width = W;
  canvas.height = H;

  ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, W, H);
  const data = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, W, H).data;

  // For dark bg: darker pixel = denser char
  const darkChars  = ' .,:;i1tfLCG08@#';
  const lightChars = '@#80GCLft1i;:,. ';

  const chars = isDark ? darkChars : lightChars;
  let output = '';

  for (let y = 0; y < H; y++) {
    let line = '';
    for (let x = 0; x < W; x++) {
      const i = (y * W + x) * 4;
      const r = data[i], g = data[i+1], b = data[i+2];
      const lum = 0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b;
      const idx = Math.floor(lum / 255 * (chars.length - 1));
      line += chars[idx];
    }
    output += line + '\n';
  }

  document.getElementById('ascii-output').textContent = output;
}

// Load image from base64
const img = document.getElementById('source-img');
img.onload = renderAscii;
img.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + IMG_B64;
</script>
</body>
</html>
